# atlassian_jira_screen (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jira Cloud screen by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "atlassian_jira_screen" "example" {
  name = "Default Screen"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the screen to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the screen.
- `id` (String) The ID of the screen.
